ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., PM sensor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is deployed */,
  "coreid" TEXT /* Unique core identifier for the sensor */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last recorded activity from the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was deployed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* ID of the sensor whose data is accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of data accessed (e.g., specific dates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* ID of the sensor to which this quality assessment applies */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quality assessment */,
  "valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the validity status */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who checked the data quality */,
  "correction_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if any correction was applied to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location entry */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* ID of the sensor associated with this location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor's location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the sensor's location */,
  "geocode_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geocode */,
  "address" TEXT /* Human-readable address of the sensor location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_locations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
